title: mentha odorifera
intro: Mentha odorifera, commonly known as Horsemint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) characterized by its fragrant leaves and spikes of small, white, or pink flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. Horsemint has been used to alleviate various health issues, such as colds, fever, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Mentha odorifera include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its purported health benefits.
